title: Help needed to find missing woman
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Thembalethu police launched a search for 19-year-old Amile Gibisela, a learner from Thembalethu, who was reported as missing by her next of kin.

According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, preliminary reports available suggest that she left her residence on Wednesday 26 June and informed her family that she is attending extra classes at school.


> She never returned home and was subsequently reported as missing.


Anyone who can assist with information that will lead to Amile’s safe return is kindly requested to contact the investigating officer, WO Frank Goliath at 079 894 1576 or Crime Stop at 08600 10111.

We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
